title_zh: AI 评测失灵、身法取代简历、以及兆瓦级算力军备竞赛
title_en: When Benchmarks Break, Behavior Becomes Credential, and the Gigawatt Arms Race Begins
summary_zh: 本周 AI 圈最尖锐信号：能力测试正在失效——大模型横扫一切基准，人类反过来快不认识「进步」长什么样。与此同时，两位数的算力扩张成为新常态，招聘逻辑正在从「你学过什么」转向「你怎么行动」。
summary_en: This week's sharpest signals from AI: capability tests are breaking down—models now ace every benchmark, leaving humans struggling to define 'progress.' Meanwhile, double-digit gigawatt expansions become the new normal, and hiring logic shifts from 'what you studied' to 'how you behave.'

articles.title_zh: Anthropic 与 Google、Broadcom 达成多千兆瓦算力合作
articles.title_en: Anthropic Expands Partnership with Google and Broadcom for Multiple Gigawatts of Next-Generation Compute
articles.highlight_zh: Anthropic 宣布与 Google Cloud、Broadcom 扩大合作，部署多千兆瓦规模的 TPU 集群。这不是新闻，是宣言：下一代 AI 竞赛的门票以「十亿瓦特」为单位计价。
articles.highlight_en: Anthropic announces expanded partnerships with Google Cloud and Broadcom to deploy multi-gigawatt TPU clusters. Not news—a declaration: entry tickets to the next-gen AI race are priced in gigawatts.

articles.title_zh: 我们真的快用完能测出 AI 能力上限的评测了
articles.title_en: We're Actually Running Out of Benchmarks to Upper Bound AI Capabilities
articles.highlight_zh: 当系统在人类设计的所有考试上都拿到满分，「更大会更好」的叙事该怎么办？评测危机的本质不是技术停滞，而是认知框架的崩塌——我们还没学会如何衡量超越自己理解能力的东西。
articles.highlight_en: When systems ace every human-designed exam, what happens to the 'bigger is better' narrative? The benchmark crisis isn't technical stagnation—it's epistemic collapse. We haven't learned to measure what surpasses our own understanding.

articles.title_zh: 行为即新凭证：简历正在被身法取代
articles.highlight_zh: GitHub 提交记录、Agent 运行轨迹、多轮对话中的决策模式——这些正在取代学位证书成为「能力证明」。在 AI 辅助编程时代，「你会什么」不如「你做过什么、怎么做」。
articles.highlight_en: GitHub commits, agent traces, decision patterns across multi-turn dialogues—these are replacing degrees as proof of competence. In the AI-assisted coding era, 'what you know' matters less than 'what you've done, and how.'

articles.title_zh: OpenAI 发布安全研究员奖学金计划
articles.highlight_zh: 每年资助 10 名研究者全职投入 AI 安全研究，提供算力与开放模型访问。安全不再是对齐团队的附属议题，而是被当作基础设施来投资——这是成熟度信号。
articles.highlight_en: Funding 10 researchers annually for full-time AI safety work, with compute and model access. Safety is no longer an alignment team's side quest—it's being invested in as infrastructure. A signal of maturity.

articles.title_en: Industrial Policy for the Intelligence Age
articles.highlight_zh: OpenAI 罕见发声谈国家层面的 AI 战略：算力基础设施、能源电网、芯片制造。当一家私营公司开始写白皮书讨论「国家竞争力」，行业已经进入不同阶段的博弈。
articles.highlight_en: OpenAI's罕见 policy brief on national AI strategy: compute infrastructure, power grids, semiconductor manufacturing. When a private company starts writing whitepapers on 'national competitiveness,' the game has entered a different phase.

articles.title_zh: AWS DevOps Agent & Security Agent 正式发布
articles.title_en: AWS Weekly Roundup: AWS DevOps Agent & Security Agent GA
articles.highlight_zh: 两个专业 Agent 走出预览：DevOps Agent 能端到端处理部署流水线，Security Agent 能自动扫描并修复安全漏洞。企业级 AI 代理正在从「概念验证」变成「生产工具」。
articles.highlight_en: Two specialized agents exit preview: DevOps Agent handles deployment pipelines end-to-end; Security Agent auto-scans and patches vulnerabilities. Enterprise AI agents are shifting from 'proof of concept' to 'production tool.'

articles.title_zh: Meta 用 AI 绘制大规模数据管道的「隐性知识地图」
articles.title_en: How Meta Used AI to Map Tribal Knowledge in Large-Scale Data Pipelines
articles.highlight_zh: Meta 用 LLM 自动提取代码注释、会议记录、故障复盘中的隐性知识，构建可查询的知识图谱。一个组织的「集体记忆」终于可以被机器读取了——前提是有人愿意把碎片写成文字。
articles.highlight_en: Meta uses LLMs to automatically extract tacit knowledge from code comments, meeting notes, and post-mortems into queryable knowledge graphs. An organization's 'collective memory' can finally be machine-readable—if someone bothers to write the fragments down.

articles.title_zh: 那个可能真正揭示「你的工作 vs AI」的数据点
articles.title_en: The One Piece of Data That Could Actually Shed Light on Your Job and AI
articles.highlight_zh: 不是「AI 能否做你的工作」，而是「AI 做你的工作时，需要多少次人类介入」。任务中断率可能比替代率更能预测未来劳动力市场的真实形态。
articles.highlight_en: Not 'can AI do your job,' but 'how many human interventions does AI need when doing your job?' Task interruption rates may predict labor market futures better than substitution rates.

articles.title_zh: 记录一切，而非为 LLM 写作
articles.title_en: Don't Write for LLMs, Just Record Everything
articles.highlight_zh: 与其猜测 AI 想要什么样的输入格式，不如忠实记录自己的思考过程。原始、混乱、未经整理的思维痕迹，对于训练下一代模型来说，可能比精心标记的数据更有价值。
articles.highlight_en: Instead of guessing what format AI wants, just faithfully record your thinking. Raw, messy, unpolished traces of thought may be more valuable for training next-gen models than carefully curated datasets.

articles.title_zh: AI 正在改变小商家的「做什么」决策
articles.title_en: AI is Changing How Small Online Sellers Decide What to Make
articles.highlight_zh: 阿里巴巴的 AI 工具 Accio 让小型跨境电商卖家能预测爆款趋势。当 AI 把「市场洞察」从大公司专属变成小商家标配，供应链的响应速度会被重新定义。
articles.highlight_en: Alibaba's AI tool Accio lets small cross-border sellers forecast trending products. When AI turns 'market insight' from corporate privilege to small-business standard, supply chain responsiveness gets redefined.
